items.title: Waymo says it built a better benchmark for comparing robotaxis to humans
items.summary: Waymo created a new computer model to help it better understand how humans behave in crash scenarios that its robotaxis encounter.

items.title: Meta signs first AI data center deal in India with Reliance
items.summary: The 168-megawatt facility will support Meta's global AI computing needs and can be expanded over time.

items.title: Top Lucid Motors executive departs amid new CEO’s leadership shakeup
items.summary: The exec, Emad Dlala, has left just a few months after being promoted to SVP of engineering and digital, TechCrunch has learned.

items.title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
items.summary: Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.

items.title: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
items.summary: Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, the Sabertooth VC founder used a captive network of LPs to invest in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX.

items.title: GM joins race to build batteries for AI data centers and the grid
items.summary: GM is developing an entirely new sodium-ion battery chemistry for use in everything from data centers to its own factories.

items.title: Hey, Siri, here’s what I actually want from AI
items.summary: I'm desperate for a personal AI assistant, but do I really want to become the kind of person who can't function without the friendly robot voice in my phone?

items.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 can make weirdly fun video games with the click of a button
items.summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 is going to be a big hit with the web's vibe coders.

items.title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
items.summary: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.

items.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence, and more
items.summary: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its long-standing Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

items.title: CISA gives US federal agencies three days to fix a VPN bug under attack by a ransomware gang
items.summary: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
items.summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

items.title: Rivian starts deliveries of its all-important R2 SUV
items.summary: Founder and CEO RJ Scaringe has called it "maybe the most important thing we've launched to date."

items.title: Apple’s foldable iPhone could be just around the corner
items.summary: The iOS 27 developer beta includes code that references the fold state and screen angle of a device.

items.title: It’s not FAANG anymore. It’s MANGOS.
items.summary: With SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI all eyeing massive public debuts, the tech industry may soon have a new class of corporate overlords — and a new acronym to match. Say goodbye to FAANG and hello to MANGOS.

items.title: Apple says it may remove some apps from the App Store if they don’t attract users
items.summary: Apple may begin removing existing apps that it considers stale, low-value, or unable to attract users.

items.title: iOS 27 features we didn’t see onstage
items.summary: While iOS 27 isn't bringing major changes, it's still got many small features that could improve everyday usage for iPhone users.

items.title: Apple brings streaming-style subscription bundles to the App Store
items.summary: Apple is expanding its App Bundles feature to allow developers to partner with one another on discounted subscription packages.

items.title: Apple’s App Store rolls out personalized recommendations
items.summary: Apple will now recommend apps based on your downloads and behavior.

items.title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
items.summary: Sandstone's Series A comes just six months after a Sequoia-led seed round.
